operations.purpose: 1-block-high white slab perimeter foundation/floor base across footprint (covers entire footprint as raised slab border and floor base).
Left vertical corner post (3 blocks high) using cobblestone.
Right vertical corner post (3 blocks high) using cobblestone.
Front (short side at z=0) lower cobblestone band base along front edge, 1 block tall between y=1 and y=1.
Back (short side at z=16) lower cobblestone band base along back edge.
Lower wall textured band filling between corner posts along base level (stonebrick as decorative lower wall).
Continuous horizontal wooden trim band above lower wall at y=2 (wraps whole building).
White slab band separating first and second story at y=3 (1 block high slab layer aligned as full block visually).
Upper wall band (stonebrick) base for second floor at y=4.
Upper wooden trim band under roof eaves at y=5.
Front lower continuous narrow window strip centered on front wall at z=1 (1-high row of glass panes).
Front upper continuous narrow window strip centered on front wall at z=1.
Back lower continuous narrow window strip at z=15.
Back upper continuous narrow window strip at z=15.
Left long-side lower continuous window strip along x=1 between z=4..12.
Left long-side upper continuous window strip at y=4 along x=1.
Right long-side lower continuous window strip along x=7.
Right long-side upper continuous window strip at y=4 along x=7.
Ensure entrance opening is clear for door placement (air space for door).
Roof base inner ridge platform (support) at y=6 to start stepped gable.
First roof step extending out one block from inner ridge at y=6 to create gable slope.
Second roof step forming roof eaves at y=6 aligning with building edges for stepped gable profile.
Small central ridge cap accent (single stone slab) at roof peak center (visual accent).
